raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad paſluddinaja wiꞥſch
jums fawu Derribu/ ko wiꞥſch
jums pawehleja darriht/ (proh-
ti) tohs definitis Wahrduis/ un
rakſtija tohs us divi akminai-
neem Galdineew.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un man pawehleja tas
KUNGS tanni Laika/ ka man
juns bij mahziht Lifkumus un
Teefas/ ka juhs tohs darritut tai
Seinnê/ us kurren juhs eetat/
to eemiantoht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad nu fargajeetees toh-
ti juhsfu Dwehſelu labbad/ jo
juhs ne effat ne kahdu Gihmi re-
dseifchi tai Deenâ/ kad tas
KUNGS Orebâ us jums run-
naja no ta Ugguns Widdus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ka juhs ne famaitajatees/
un darrat jums ne kahdu isgree-
ſtu Bildi/ to Gihmi no jebkux-
ras Bildes/ to Gihmi kahda
Wihra/ ieb Seewas/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "To Gihmi kahda Lohpa/
kas wirs Semmes irr/ to Gihmi
kahda fpahrnaina Putna/ kas
appakſch Debbes ſtraida.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "To Gihmi no jebkurra/
kas wirs Semmes ſeen/ to Gih-
mi no jebkahdas ſiws/ kas Uh-
deni Semmes Appakſcha irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ka tu arridsan tawas Az-
zis ne pazell us Debbeſi/ usrau-
dsians to Sauli/ un to Meh-
neti/ un tahs Swwigſnes/ wiſſu
Debbes Spehku/ un tu tohpi
paskubbinahts/ ka tu buhtu
wiꞥſch winneem flannijees/ unno jebkahdas ſectas/ un darrat
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet juhs irr tas KUNGS
veenehmis/ un irr juhs no ta
Dselses Zepta no Egiptes iswed-
dis/ ka juhs wiꞥnam par ihpa-
scheem Laudim buhtut/ itt ka tas
ſchodeen irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tas KUNGS apdufino-
jahs arri pahr manni juhfu
Wahrdu deht/ un wiꞥſch ſweh-
reja/ ka man ne bij pahr to Jar-
danu eet/ un ka man ne bij us-
to labbu Semmi nahkt/ ko tas
KUNGS taws Deews teu par
Ihpaschumu dohd.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo man irr ſchinni Sem-
mê jamirst/ man ne irr pahr to
Jardanu ja-eet/ bet jums irr ja-
eet/ un ja-eemanto fchı labba
Semme.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fargajtees nu/ ka juhs
ta KUNGA juhfa Deewa Der-
ribu/ ko wiꞥſch ar jums darrijs
irr/ ne aismirstat/ ka juhs buhtut
jew kahdu isgreeftu Bildi darrij-
fchees/ to Gihmi no jebkurra/ ka
tas KUNGS taws Deews ais-
leedsis irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo tas KUNGS tawe
Deews irr weens northjams ug-
guns/ weens STIPRAIG
DEEWS/ weens Duſinôtajs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad juhs nu Behraus un
Behruu Behraus dſeindingajat/
un wezzi tapfeet tai Semme/ un
famaitafitees/ darridami kahdu
isgreeftu Bildi/ weenu Gihmi
no jebkahdas ſectas/ un darrat
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
